ddls:
CREATE TABLE "models" (
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each model */,
  "algorithm" TEXT /* Algorithm used for the model (e.g., cosine similarity) */,
  "dataset" TEXT /* Name of the dataset used for training/testing */,
  "partition" INTEGER /* Partition index used for dataset */,
  "build_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to build the model (in seconds) */,
  "test_time" INTEGER /* Time taken to test the model (in seconds) */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  "training_parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used during model training */,
  "model_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the model */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who created the model */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the model was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("model_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_models_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "performance_metrics" (
  "metric_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance metric record */,
  "model_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the evaluated model */,
  "rmse_by_user" REAL /* RMSE calculated per user */,
  "rmse_by_rating" REAL /* RMSE calculated per rating */,
  "n_users" INTEGER /* Number of users involved in the evaluation */,
  "n_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of attempts made in the evaluation */,
  "n_good" INTEGER /* Number of good evaluations */,
  "coverage" REAL /* Coverage metric indicating the percentage of items recommended */,
  "ndcg" REAL /* nDCG score indicating quality of recommendations */,
  "mae_by_user" REAL /* MAE calculated per user */,
  "mae_by_rating" REAL /* MAE calculated per rating */,
  "test_partition" TEXT /* Partition used for testing */,
  "train_partition" TEXT /* Partition used for training */,
  "test_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the testing was completed */,
  "training_time" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the training was completed */,
  "model_version" TEXT /* Version of the model */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("metric_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_performance_metrics_model_id FOREIGN KEY ("model_id") REFERENCES models ("model_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user in the system (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp of when the user account was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
column_names: Algorithm used for the model (e.g., cosine similarity)
Name of the dataset used for training/testing
Time taken to build the model (in seconds)
Time taken to test the model (in seconds)
User ID of the user who created the model
Timestamp of when the model was created
Unique identifier for each performance metric record
Number of users involved in the evaluation
Number of attempts made in the evaluation
Coverage metric indicating the percentage of items recommended
nDCG score indicating quality of recommendations
Timestamp of when the testing was completed
Timestamp of when the training was completed
Role of the user in the system (e.g., data scientist, analyst, admin)
Timestamp of the user's last login
User account status (e.g., active, inactive, suspended)
Timestamp of when the user account was created
